teams Our party Contact Donate Join Donate Join Get involved Get emails Display a poster Andrew Stunell Fund Our campaigns Protect Our Community Park at Tangshutt Fields An additional hospital for Stockport NHS dentists Fair adoption pay Save our green belt Community-led housing Stop sewage Marple's World Heritage Speed Camera Campaign Illegal off-road biking Save Hazel Grove's NatWest Branch Save post office services in High Lane Save Stockport Post Office Campaign wins Specialist status for Stepping Hill Save our ticket offices Offerton fire crews saved New leisure hub for Marple Preserve the Green Belt Save Central Library Preserving Chadkirk Chapel Saving the 375 bus Rail services on the Rose Hill line Our local teams Bredbury & Woodley Bredbury Green & Romiley Hazel Grove Manor Marple North Marple South & High Lane Norbury & Woodsmoor Offerton Our party What we stand for Get updates Local news Keep up to date with news from Lisa Smart and the Hazel Grove Constituency Lib Dems Hazel Grove Mountain rescue teams being put under threat A change to the Health and Social Care Act threatens to put at risk the work of local mountain rescue teams across the country, says Liberal Democrat MP Lisa Smart, who has written to the Minister opposing the change. 17 Apr 2026 View Hazel Grove MP cries foul over Government’s dental blocks Liberal Democrat MP Lisa Smart has demanded action from the Government over “insurmountable” blocks on dentists wanting to work in the area, caused by their “Certificate of Sponsorship” Scheme. 16 Mar 2026 View Hazel Grove MP raises questions over impact of Buxton closures on Stepping Hill MP Lisa Smart has written to Health Minister Karin Smyth following the news that closures at Buxton Hospital have seen patients redirected to Stepping Hill, putting even more pressure on the hospital. 16 Mar 2026 View Budget Government slammed over Council funding claims Local MP Lisa Smart has slammed the Labour Government over what she called “wildly misleading claims” about increases in the local government funding settlement and its impact on Stockport. 16 Mar 2026 View Hazel Grove Lisa Smart MP resoundingly reselected for Hazel Grove constituency MP Lisa Smart has been resoundingly reselected for the Liberal Democrats at the next general election. 25 Feb 2026 View Hazel Grove MP meets with the team of Woodley Pantry Local MP Lisa Smart went to Your Local Pantry’s branch in Woodley recently to meet with the volunteers and FareShare representatives and find out more about how they are helping local residents. 25 Feb 2026 View Hazel Grove MP visits Offerton Wavers Community Café MP Lisa Smart visited the Wavers Community Café at Offerton Community Centre this week to see how the local initiative supports women to build confidence, skills, and connections so that they can lead successful lives. 23 Feb 2026 View Hazel Grove Update on Stockport Sports Village Council confirms gym access at Stockport Sports Village will continue until December 2026 13 Feb 2026 View Hazel Grove Stepping Hill funding must be a part of the Government’s Spring Statement Funding the desperately long backlog of repairs at Stepping Hill Hospital must feature in the Government’s Spring Statement, said local MP Lisa Smart, after she wrote to the Chancellor and Health Secretary ahead of the Government’s Spring Statement. 9 Feb 2026 View Hazel Grove MP pushes for information on Metrolink benefits for constituency MP Lisa Smart is pushing Transport for Greater Manchester (TfGM) for information on how the proposed Metrolink line to Stockport will benefit residents across the wider area. 9 Feb 2026 View Hazel Grove Cheshire Wildlife Trust meets with local MP Local MP Lisa Smart was at Etherow Park recently to meet with James Melling from the Cheshire Wildlife Trust, to hear
